name: @nimbalyst/extension-memory
description: Voice/agent grounding: a local project-knowledge + facts brain for Nimbalyst. Wraps the host-agnostic memory engine (MCP server) and, later, bridges it to the voice agent.

scripts.build: npm run build --prefix engine && vite build && vite build --config vite.backend.config.ts
scripts.test: echo "engine tests run via root vitest"
